channel.title: Poznan Studies in Contemporary Linguistics
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Poznan Studies in Contemporary Linguistics

item.title: Modelling the choice between PP+DE+N and PP+N possessive constructions in Mandarin Chinese: a mixed effects logistic regression approach
item.description: Article by Nana Zhou DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/psicl-2024-0053

item.title: Case-mismatching versus D-linking of ATB wh-questions in Korean
item.description: Article by Nana Zhou DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/psicl-2024-0030

item.title: Impacts of working memory, L2 proficiency, and cognitive flexibility on cross-domain structural priming
item.description: Article by Nana Zhou DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/psicl-2023-0071

item.title: Developing awareness of Global Englishes: questioning the native-speakerist paradigm of ELT at a Polish university
item.description: Article by Nana Zhou DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/psicl-2023-0048

item.title: Continua and orientations of packing-repacking and unpacking ideational metaphor for knowledge construction
item.description: Article by Nana Zhou DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/psicl-2024-0044
